indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks privacy and acoustic enclosure, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: high ceiling with exposed beams
indicators.rationale: High ceilings and exposed beams create a noisy and industrial atmosphere incompatible with sleep.

indicators.name: industrial lighting
indicators.rationale: Industrial lighting is bright and harsh, disrupting circadian rhythms and making it difficult to fall asleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is highly unsuitable for sleep (primary). The large open space, high ceiling with exposed beams, and industrial lighting all contribute to an environment that is noisy, bright, and lacks privacy, making it difficult to achieve restful sleep.
